title: linanthus aureus
intro: Linanthus aureus, also known as the golden linanthus or desert snapdragon, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Linanthus aureus include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Linanthus aureus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
